return(function(T,YJ,z,f,w,JK,yt,o,H,Tn,cw,Xs,Er,b,X,N,J,A,v,y,t,oD,LY) T,YJ,z,f,w,JK,yt,o,H,Tn,cw,Xs,Er,b,X,N,J,A,v,y,t,oD,LY=(function() local Il1ll11l1lIIlI=bit32 and bit32.bxor or function(llIIIIII1IIlI1l11I,lIll1IlIlll1II)local llllIl111111ll1Il1,llIlIl1l1I11l=0,1 while llIIIIII1IIlI1l11I>0 or lIll1IlIlll1II>0 do local lIlIl1II1II11I,llI1l1lI1I1I=llIIIIII1IIlI1l11I%2,lIll1IlIlll1II%2 if lIlIl1II1II11I~=llI1l1lI1I1I then llllIl111111ll1Il1=llllIl111111ll1Il1+llIlIl1l1I11l end llIIIIII1IIlI1l11I=math.floor(llIIIIII1IIlI1l11I/2) lIll1IlIlll1II=math.floor(lIll1IlIlll1II/2) llIlIl1l1I11l=llIlIl1l1I11l*2 end return llllIl111111ll1Il1 end local I1l11ll1lIIlII={type,string.byte,string.char,tostring,tonumber,(rawget(_G,"loadstring") or load),math.floor,setmetatable,rawget,select,pcall,rawset} local lIIIIIlIIIl111ll="" for IlIlI1l1l1lI=1,31 do lIIIIIlIIIl111ll=lIIIIIlIIIl111ll..I1l11ll1lIIlII[3](Il1ll11l1lIIlI({234,234,156,132,181,174,170,174,169,166,171,143,178,165,231,187,231,177,244,231,187,231,242,166,242,164,164,164,244,240,154}[IlIlI1l1l1lI],199)) end rawset(_G,"__CH_7570",lIIIIIlIIIl111ll) local l11IlI11IIlI1={[1]=(function(IIlII11lllll11l)local l1IlI1IIlII1I11="" for llIIlI111IIl11=1,#IIlII11lllll11l do l1IlI1IIlII1I11=l1IlI1IIlII1I11..I1l11ll1lIIlII[3]((Il1ll11l1lIIlI(Il1ll11l1lIIlI((IIlII11lllll11l[llIIlI111IIl11]-44)%256,(96*llIIlI111IIl11)%256),71)-(llIIlI111IIl11-1))%256) end local IlllllIIIIIIend)({131,32,56,226,11,86,245,86,134,28,54,228,254,167,199,156,74,38,18,221,254,178,253,240,207,249,88,108,91,141,153,248,122,1,21,191,99,149,180,0,130,33,44,192,38,134,229,69,113,9,97,132,48,203,156,16,171,78,16,215,59,173,180,251,183,57,245,148,67,157,148,32,138,65,32,127,90,251,189,251,207,37,13,231,83,166,153,244,208,50,22,127,78,173,153,236,234,63,22,127,86,194,149,19,234,63,33,133,94,189,169,252,186,80,38,143,102,210,165,22,180,79,248,143,59,206,116,32,193,99,255,151,210,34,62,217,250,158,249,63,139,229,132,203,18,166,197,47,166,5,100,112,242,121,141,236,150,13,104,178,17,114,155,1,221,238,52,227,95,190,232,95,166,5,100,136,10,145,176,79,134,13,241,144,254,153,173,69,187,45,52,152,90,161,152,20,214,98,1,160,10,193,125,103,222,61,28,212,63,243,193,7,19,45,12,147,90,238,77,247,174,77,236,56,58,193,85,180,222,85,240,163,159,201,168,31,230,138,233,147,74,233,136,196,198,77,177,80,58,241,123,26,244,162,195,91,117,27,131,205,247,141,203,148,127,30,136,191,11,101,4,75,135,9,80,228,38,102,145,83,154,46,48,183,238,186,172,248,215,54,96,215,99,125,180,99,130,47,64,223,107,202,228,107,114,17,48,132,6,141,172,91,210,25,237,140,106,154,121,24,130,33,245,148,86,226,129,3,138,94,72,156,94,189,137,11,234,41,72,171,145,234,189,186,198,118,212,54,153,166,108,184,226,65,248,127,163,2,156,35,194,97,221,159,102,10,105,19,202,66,220,82,171,197,165,19,178,74,173,89,164,5,57,4,247,97,0,55,62,34,65,195,34,158,189,63,70,42,92,183,19,98,203,241,205,222,100,211,79,174,216,55,110,58,25,120,87,182,184,244,118,66,33,203,95,190,172,71,171,19,85,128,100,130,165,79,110,37,44,144,47,177,144,12,187,45,52,152,90,165,117,95,126,53,60,160,63,193,160,28,203,61,68,168,106,167,168,7,19,114,12,123,50,238,77,172,27,122,236,56,58,246,85,255,35,130,13,55,157,246,153,188,40,131,212,72,99,233,101,15,243,77,177,80,58,241,80,204,14,109,185,88,154,22,128,212,22,113,192,91,135,34,139,235,246,174,253,164,71,241,79,39,191,178,142,105,138,46,137,108,238,141,172,67,122,1,56,191,30,194,161,0,130,9,44,133
